summary: Increased crown bulk distally suggests a growing mandible needing more room; this characteristic matches the developmental profile of the mandibular canine, ensuring proper alignment as other molars erupt later. Therefore, it fits best under "mandibular canine" classification. \(\boxed{\text{B}}\)
